title: senna demissa var. radicans
intro: Senna demissa var. radicans is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the senna or cassia plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, such as sensnosides A and B. The health benefits of Senna demissa var. radicans include relief from constipation, improved digestion, and support for the treatment of certain skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
